sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88892" key="prosdiasu/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσδια-σύρω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <sense id="n88892.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">satirize</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ridicule besides</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προδιασ-</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
